8/9 14:00 美領事館
外爭港權，內除港賊

另外：文宣大召集、各區連儂牆要人！


全民抗爭，長久戰、拖垮邪惡、打倒腐敗

每日任務：
1. 抵制支持「邪惡」「無良」的商店，例如cctvb廣告、黨鐵商埸、黑社會、打壓員工的店鋪、減少淘寶
2. 安全情況下跳閘，免費搭港鐵
3. 夜晚十點咆哮！！！
4. 做運動，身體健康，鬥長命
4. 每日一個post，社交媒體戰（Twitter, IG, Facebook, Reddit) #HongKongProtest
#FreeHongKong #HongKongProtests #Chinazi
5. 不要說推，試著將呢段訊息copy and paste嚟推post

每星期任務：
1. 罷買Bye Buy Day：星期日、星期五(唔買非必需品）
2. 每星期做孝子，關心下老母老豆老人家，自己老母自己救
3. 每星期去連儂牆貼3張文宣

每月任務：
1. 出糧換美金、買美股、少掂中港股票
2. MPF都買美股
3. 搵多幾個人參與
或者做唔足，但我會堅持到尾，Best effort，你呢？
Version 2019.09.04

The FIVE demands of the protest

1. Full withdrawal of the extradition bill

2. A commission of inquiry into alleged police brutality

3. Retracting the classification of protesters as “rioters”

4. Amnesty for arrested protesters

5. Dual universal suffrage, meaning for both the Legislative Council and
the Chief Executive

FIVE DEMANDS,
NOT ONE LESS.
LIBERATE HONG KONG,
REVOLUTION OF OUR TIMES

replies.msg:
9月6日 「反濫捕 抗威權」集會
日期：9月6日
時間：7:30pm
地點：遮打花園（正申請不反對通知書）

狠人今晚收到有外國朋友同我講「Congratulations！」問我：「香港人係唔係贏左喇？」

證明林鄭奸招真係成功欺騙到不少外國朋友！

為左咁，大家要廣傳更多英文版本的文宣給外國朋友，千萬唔好讓林鄭奸計得逞！！ 仲有星期日一定要上街！

英文文宣如下：

Put the bill Withdrawal in motion (after summer break of Legco in Oct) is only a mean to create a rift between frontliners and peacemakers.

Moreover, millions of citizens have come out to express their dissatisfaction towards the current political system and the performance of the government. Yet, the government chose to shift the responsibility of the political turmoil to the protesters and condemned violence selectively. They are turning a blind eye to the voice of the people, while pandering to the “white terror” and police brutality in Hong Kong.

What's the difference between the withdrawals of June 9th and September 4th? It's that the latter was through our companions' blood:
- 2 terrorist attacks in MTR(Yuen Long, Prince Edward)
- Attacks with knives causing severe injury in 2 people
- 9 losses of life
- Sexual assault of our female fighters
- Tear gas abuse on citizens and in MTR
- over 1000+ arrests
- 100+ prosecutions
- 6 cerebral bleeding
- 30+ broken bones
- Uncountable injuries and exiles

This doesn't count #metoo and the people who have yet to speak out, so we cannot stop here!

And just from that, the difference is clear, and the immorality of the entire police force and administration is very obvious. All five core demands must be met, and none can be left out!

And we must all remember the fighters we have lost in the movement.

Mr. Hong KJ(25) - 15/12/2017
Mr. Leung JK(35) - 15/6/2019
Ms. Lu XY(21) - 30/6/2019
Zhita Wu(29) - 30/6/2019
Ms. Mak(28) - 3/7/2019
Mr. Mui(32) - 5/7/2019
Mr. Fan(26) - 22/7/2019
Mr. Calvin Kwok - 27/8/2019
Mr. Ki (16) - 2/9/2019



https://www.facebook.com/110776013598523/posts/126617315347726?sfns=mo

The House bill is led by Representative Smith and Representative McGovern and includes Representatives Tom Suozzi (D-NY), Scott Perry (R-PA), Brad Sherman (D-CA), and Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA) as co-sponsors. Joining Senator Rubio on the Senate bill are Senator Jim Risch (R-ID), Chairman of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee, and Senator Bob Menendez (D-NJ), Ranking Member of the Senate Foreign Relations Committee and Senators Ben Cardin (D-MD), Tom Cotton (R-AR), Angus King (I-ME), Ed Markey, (D-MA), and Josh Hawley (R-MO). Senators King and Cotton and Representative Suozzi are CECC Commissioners.

replies.msg: 無錯有限字數大家減減

We have five demands. Withdrawal of the amendment bill is only one of them. The five demands are:
1. Full withdrawal of the extradition bill
2. A commission of inquiry into alleged police brutality
3. Retracting the classification of protesters as “rioters”
4. Amnesty for arrested protesters
5. Dual universal suffrage for both the Legislative Council and
the Chief Executive
The 2nd, 3rd, and the 4th demands arise because the government refused to withdraw the bill amendment after a marching of 1 million Hong Kong people. The 5th demand is the ultimate solution of the turmoil in Hong Kong.
Now the government withdraws the bill, and it is not a concession at all. It’s only a tactic of the government trying to kill the movement by the people.

FIVE DEMANDS NOT ONE LESS

replies.msg:
原作者唔係我
(雖然我諗個手足唔會介意)

保持憤怒

我哋仲有接近一千個義士等緊政治審判

我哋唔可以辜負佢哋嘅心血

緊記！！我哋無贏過。從來都無！

黑警濫權一定要追究

如果我哋今次一退，就完全地輸曬，我哋已無退路！

⚠️⚠️麻煩推爆佢，話比啲外國人知單嘢未完⚠️⚠️

Today, the leader of Hong Kong, Carrie Lam, proposed a motion of the withdrawal of the extradition bill. This, however, does not signify the victory of our battle.

In the press release, the leader blatantly dismissed the other four demands of two million protestors, including the establishment of an independent commission of inquiry and universal suffrage. Also, the bill is still NOT FORMALLY withdrawn as the retraction is a mere motion that can be vetoed by the pro-Beijing camp of the legislative body. Our demands are still not met.

The fugitive bill saga reveals the abuse of power of the police and the tightening grip of freedom from Beijing. Since June, we have seen the police force harming civilians in train stations; Beijing threatening to mobilise the garrison. To Hongkongers, the protest is now an act of resistance against police brutality and the narrowing freedom taken away by China. We are fighting for our future.

In such difficult time, we would love to ask for your support. Your understanding of our situation is important to pressurise the government.

We shall never surrender. Please support us.

TL;DR: It isn’t fucking over; Carrie Lam’s playing with words
